noGutters.description: Removes the gutter gap between columns.

gap.description: Gutter override — a single value for both axes, or `[x, y]`. Accepts px numbers or any CSS length.

columns.description: Total columns the row is divided into. Defaults to 12.

align.description: Vertical alignment of columns (align-items): start, end, center, baseline, stretch.

alignSm.description: align from the sm breakpoint up.

alignMd.description: align from the md breakpoint up.

alignLg.description: align from the lg breakpoint up.

alignXl.description: align from the xl breakpoint up.

alignXxl.description: align from the xxl breakpoint up.

justify.description: Horizontal distribution of columns (justify-content): start, end, center, space-between, space-around, space-evenly.

justifySm.description: justify from the sm breakpoint up.

justifyMd.description: justify from the md breakpoint up.

justifyLg.description: justify from the lg breakpoint up.

justifyXl.description: justify from the xl breakpoint up.

justifyXxl.description: justify from the xxl breakpoint up.

alignContent.description: Alignment of wrapped rows (align-content): start, end, center, space-between, space-around, space-evenly, stretch.

density.description: Gutter size preset — default (24px), comfortable (16px), or compact (8px).

tag.description: The element the row renders as.
